description: Letter from the first half of the eleventh century which contains an appeal for help in ransoming captives. The letter is from the community of Alexandria to Efrayim b. Shemarya and the Palestinian congregation of Fustat. Dating: ca. 1007–1055 CE, based on the years when Efrayim b. Shemarya was active. (Information from Frenkel)
description_he: מכתב מקהילת אלכסנדריה לאפרים בן שמריה ולקהל הארץ ישראלי בפוסטאט, בקשת פדיון שבויים
